name: zsnd_cd_play_track
description: zSndCd::PlayTrack seeks the MCI CD device to a track and resets cached CD track state.
known_limits: Binary-safe verification is accepted by the zsnd_cd_play_track VC target.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly/decompilation at 0x4a2750 validates the ready-flag guard, MCI_SEEK with flags 0x0a, low-word device id, low-byte track id, ReportMciError line 0x16e on error, ResetTrackState call, current/play-from/play-to track writes, and return values.
The native smoke verifies not-ready behavior and a patched-MCI success path including device id, command id, flags, MCI_SEEK_PARMS target track, and cached track-state writes.
VC target zsnd_cd_play_track passed COFF byte comparison with zero unmasked mismatches under VC5SP3 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 /FAcs.
